title: Vulcan for Mac
description: Modpack that aims to provide smooth experience on macOS using Vulcan renderer and QoL mods.
body:
This Minecraft modpack for macOS utilizes the Vulkan renderer instead of the traditional OpenGL renderer. The Vulkan renderer is designed to provide better graphics performance and more efficient resource utilization on modern hardware. By leveraging the capabilities of the Vulkan API, this modpack aims to deliver higher frame rates, reduced stuttering, and improved visual fidelity compared to the default Minecraft graphics engine.

<details>
<summary>List of mods:</summary>

- BadOptimizations
- BoxLib
- Cloth Config v17
- Continuity
- Dynamic FPS
- EntityCulling
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FerriteCore
- Freecam
- GPU Tape
- Lithium
- MaLiLib
- Mod Menu
- Model Gap Fix
- Noisium
- Placeholder API
- Shift\-Scroll Fix
- ThreadTweak
- VulkanMod
- WorldEdit
- YOSBR
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- Zoomify
</details>
